# Daedalus T3Code Upstream Provenance

This directory is a quarantined raw upstream snapshot for reference and derivation tracking.

- Source path: /home/likas/Research/gui-inspiration/t3code
- Source commit: 0d55a42840231122f8d7414b35f155343031f82d
- Snapshot date: 2026-04-30 UTC

## Quarantine rule

Daedalus packages must not import from this directory. Code in `third_party/t3code-upstream/` is retained only as provenance/reference material; any Daedalus implementation must copy, adapt, or reimplement required ideas into Daedalus-owned package paths with appropriate review.
